nodes.itemHTML: • Kaldistars12k - Toolkit for speech recognition. [Apache]
• fffstars525 - A micro-framework for creating fake C functions. [MIT]

• JsLadies BR - Loc: - Lang: PT-BR only

    A group for women interested in web development and javascript with open and free meetings, workshops and talks.
• Functional Programming for Mortals - Sam Halliday
• vue-pwa-speechstars92 - A Speech to text With Google Cloud Speech on Vue2 + Vuetify + Progressive Web App
• vue-swalstars188 - A small wrapper for integrating SweetAlert to Vuejs. (Compatible with SSR)
• Craft Cookbook - Quick solutions to common Craft CMS problems.
• Craft Link List - Curated publication collecting interesting links.
• CraftX - Open source site built on Craft 3, and community of web professionals hosting hangouts.
• CppCon 2017 Presentation Materialsstars1.7k - CppCon 2017 Presentation Materials.
• Ctwise Alfred Workflowsstars463 - Workflows from the Github user "ctwise".
• Vítor Galvão’s Alfred Workflowsstars2.2k - Workflows from the Github user "vitorgalvao".
• NancyFxstars7.2k - Lightweight, low-ceremony, framework for building HTTP-based services on .NET and Mono

• Neliburstars125 - Nelibur is message based web service framework on the pure WCF. Nelibur simplifies creating high-performance and message-based web services and you certainly have all the power of the WCF.

• Serenestars2.3k - Serenity is an ASP.NET MVC application platform designed to simplify and shorten development of data-centric business applications with a service-based architecture. Serene is a starter template to build Serenity applications.
• NodeAssetsstars23 - Asset Manager for .NET that has live CSS updates using SignalR and can optionally leverage Node.js compilers
• SquishItstars463 - Lets you easily bundle some CSS and JavaScript
• FAKEstars1.2k - F# Make, a cross-platform build automation system
• Cakestars3.4k - Cake (C# Make) is a cross-platform build automation system with a C# DSL.
• Foundatiostars1.6k - A common interface with in memory, Redis and hybrid implementations.
• Cashewstars77 - a .NET library for caching responses easily with an HttpClient through an API that is simple and elegant yet powerful.
• EntryPointstars138 - Composable CLI Argument Parser for .NET Core & .NET Framework 4.5+.
• JSILstars1.7k - CIL to JavaScript Compiler http://jsil.org/
• Snappy for Windows - Snappy compression library for .NET baked on P/Invoke
• RavenDBstars3.1k - A LINQ-enabled document database for .NET
• Martenstars1.9k - PostgreSQL as a document database and event store for .NET applications
• Npgsqlstars2.7k - .NET data provider for PostgreSQL
• MongoDBstars2.9k - Official MongoDB C# driver
• ServiceStack Redisstars2.3k - .NET's leading C# Redis client
• StackExchange Redisstars5.3k - General purpose Redis client from StackExchange
• Cassandrastars547 - DataStax .NET driver for Apache Cassandra
• Couchbasestars261 - Official Couchbase .NET client library, based on the Enyim memcached client
• DateTimeExtensionsstars453 - Common Date Time operations on the form of extensions to System.DateTime, including holidays and working days calculations on several culture locales.
• Exceptionless.DateTimeExtensionsstars185 - DateTimeRange, Business Day and various DateTime, DateTimeOffset, TimeSpan extension methods.
• Unfoldstars133 - PowerShell-based deployment solution for .NET web applications
• Octo Packstars181 - Used to build NuGet packages of your application for deployment using tools such as Octopus Deploy

• Akka.netstars4.2k - Akka.NET is a port of the popular Java/Scala framework Akka to .NET. This is a community-driven port and is not affiliated with Typesafe who makes the original Java/Scala version.

• Zebusstars269 - Zebus is a lightweight, highly versatile, peer-to-peer service bus, built with CQRS principles in mind. It allows applications to communicate with each other in a fast and easy manner. Most of the complexity is hidden in the library and you can focus on writing code that matters to you, not debugging messaging code. A very fundamental base for any distributed application.
• Paypal Merchant SDKstars81 - Official PayPal Merchant SDK for .NET
• Stripe.Netstars1.2k - Stripe.net is a full service .NET API for https://stripe.com/

• Virto Commercestars1.1k - Virto Commerce is the second generation release and is the only enterprise level e-commerce product fully available under Open Source license. Virto Commerce is based on .NET 4.5 with extensive use of MVC, IoC, EF, Azure, AngularJS and many other cutting edge technologies. It can be deployed in Microsoft Cloud (Azure), Amazon Web Services (AWS) and on-premise. https://virtocommerce.com
• Dotnet CLIstars3.5k - The cross-platform .NET Core command-line toolchain utility.
• Mediator.Netstars317 - A simple mediator for .NET for sending command, publishing event and request response with pipelines supported

• Wave Engine - Wave engine is a free C# component-based modern game engine which allows you to create cross-platform games supporting Kinect, Oculus Rift, Vuforia, Cardboard, Leap Motion and much more. [Free][Proprietary]
• Nezstars1.4k - Nez is a free 2D-focused framework that works with MonoGame and FNA
• Bonobo Git Serverstars1.7k - Bonobo Git Server for Windows is a web application you can install on your IIS and easily manage and connect to your Git repositories. https://bonobogitserver.com/
• GitVersionstars2.4k - Generate a Semantic Version Number based on the state of your Git repository
• LibGit2Sharpstars2.7k - LibGit2Sharp brings all the might and speed of libgit2, a native Git implementation, to the managed world of .NET and Mono.
• MahApps.Metrostars8.5k - Toolkit for creating Metro-styled WPF apps
• Eto.Formsstars3.1k - Cross-platform GUI framework for desktop and mobile applications in .NET and Mono
• MaterialSkinstars2.5k - Theming .NET WinForms, C# or VB.Net, to Google's Material Design principles.
• dotlessstars692 - .NET port of the Ruby Less CSS lib http://www.dotlesscss.org
• ExCSSstars266 - CSS3 parser library for C#
• Http.fsstars305 - A functional HTTP client for F#.
• RestSharpstars8.7k - Simple REST and HTTP API client for .NET
• EasyHttpstars951 - HTTP library for C#
• MonoDevelopstars2.7k - MonoDevelop is a cross-platform IDE mostly aimed at Mono/.NET developers
• Squirrelstars6.5k - Squirrel is both a set of tools and a library, to completely manage both installation and updating your desktop Windows application.
• Chocolateystars8.6k - like yum or apt-get, but for Windows.
• LegacyWrapperstars60 - LegacyWrapper uses a wrapper process to call DLLs from a process of the opposing architecture (x86 or AMD64).
• Ninjectstars2.6k - The ninja of .NET dependency injectors
• Edge.jsstars5.3k - Run .NET and Node.js code in-process on Windows, macOS, and Linux
• NLogstars5.6k - NLog - Advanced .NET and Silverlight logging
• Logazmicstars50 - Open source NLog viewer for Windows
• FluentEmailstars2.3k - A fluent wrapper for System.Net.Mail with Razor templating support.
• PreMailer.Netstars574 - C# library that moves your stylesheets to inline style attributes, for maximum compatibility with e-mail clients.
• Foundatiostars1.6k - A common interface with in-memory, Redis, StatsD, and Metrics.NET implementations.
• CSharp Pad - A web-based C# REPL with awesome code completion.
• FlatMapperstars82 - A library to import and export data from and to plain text files in a LINQ-compatible way.
• ScriptCSstars2.4k - Write C# apps with a text editor, NuGet and the power of Roslyn!
• TinyMapperstars635 - A tiny and quick object mapper for .NET.
• ExpressMapperstars298 - A lightweight, lighting fast .NET mapper to map one type of object(s) to another in automated and easy way. ExpressMapper relies completely on the expression trees.
• Dapper.FastCRUDstars421 - The fastest micro-ORM extension for Dapper
• Insight.Databasestars753 - Insight.Database is a fast, lightweight, micro-ORM for .NET
• NuGet - The .NET package manager
• SqlKata - Elegant SQL query builder, that supports complex queries, joins, sub queries, nested where conditions, vendor engine targets and more
• Foundatiostars1.6k - A common interface with in-memory, Redis and Azure implementations.
• PlainElastic.Netstars155 - Plain .NET client for ElasticSearch
• SolrNetstars898 - Solr client for .NET
• Jilstars2.1k - Fast .NET JSON serializer, built on Sigil (used by StackOverflow)
• Automatonymousstars662 - A state machine library for .NET - allows you to write fluent style state machines
• Sandra.Snowstars231 - Jekyll-inspired static site generation for .NET
• NUnitstars2.2k - A unit-testing framework for all .NET languages
• CatLight - Build status notifications for TFS/Jenkins/Travis/Appveyor. Cross-platform desktop app based on .NET Core and Electron. [Free][Proprietary]
• NancyFxstars7.2k - Lightweight, low-ceremony, framework for building HTTP-based services on .NET and Mono
• IISNodestars1.8k - Host Node.js applications in IIS
• Suave.IO - Framework/library/web server that makes you cry tears of joy after finishing your project ahead-of-time when you look at the beautiful code you've written in F#.
• NetGain - A high performance WebSocket server library powering Stack Overflow.

• Exoplayerstars19.9k - ExoPlayer is an application level media player for Android, allow playing audio and video both locally and over the Internet. Supports features like Dynamic adaptive streaming over HTTP (DASH), SmoothStreaming and Common Encryption
• Android Debug Bridge - ADB - a command-line tool to assist in debugging Android-powered devices
• Permission Dispatcherstars11k - Simple annotation-based API to handle runtime permissions.
• RxPermissionsstars10.4k - Android runtime permissions powered by RxJava.
• ROS 2 Design - Articles which inform and guide the ROS 2.0 design efforts.
• ROS 2 Docs (Overview) - Details about ROS 2 internal design and organisation.
• ROS 2 Wiki - Entry point to find all kind of information about ROS 2.
• Component-Based Style Reuse 📄 transcript ⌚ 37:24 - Pete Hunt @ CSS conf 2016.
• CSS4 Grid: True Layout Finally Arrives 📄 transcript ⌚ 29:27 - Jen Kramer @ CSS conf 2016.
• Houdini: Demystifying the Future of CSS ⌚ 36:58 @ Google I/O 2016.
• CSS Workflow from the Ground Up ⌚ 46:06 - Jonathan Snook @ Generate conf 2015.
• RMariaDBstars110 - An R interface to MariaDB (a replacement for the old RMySQL package)
• Stopping a Jeep Cherokee on the Highway Remotely - Chris Valasek's and Charlie Miller's pivotal research on hacking into Jeep's presented at DEFCON in 2015.
• 2014 Car Hacker's Handbook - Free guide to hacking vehicles from 2014. You can also buy the book on Amazon here.
• A Comprehensible Guide to Controller Area Network - An older book from 2005, but still a comprehensive guide on CAN buses and networking in vehicles.
• Controller Area Network Prototyping with Arduino - This book guides you through prototyping CAN applications on Arduinos, which can help when working with CAN on your own car.
• Embedded Networking with CAN and CANopen - From 2003, this book fills in gaps in CAN literature and will educate you further on CAN networks and working with embedded systems.
• OpenGarages - Provides public access, documentation and tools necessary to understand today's modern vehicle systems.

• Chris Valasek: Security Lead at UberATC
    • Twitter
    • Website

• Charlie Miller: Hacked the first Apple iPhone, now does car security.
    • Twitter

• Samy Kamkar: Created MySpace Worm, RollJam, OwnStar.
    • Twitter
    • Website

• Justin Seitz: Author of Black Hat Python (No Starch Press).
    • Twitter

• Troy Hunt: Pluralsight author. Microsoft Regional Director and MVP for Developer Security. Creator of haveibeenpwned.
    • Twitter
    • Website
• Security Weekly - Excellent podcast covering all ranges of security, with some episodes focusing portions on vehicle security from cars to drones.
• Car Hacking with Craig Smith - Software Engineering Daily did an amazing episode with Craig Smith, author of the Car Hacking Handbook (above), on hacking into vehicles.

• Arduino - Arduino boards have a number of shields you can attach to connect to CAN-enabled devices.
    • CANdiy-Shieldstars23
    • ChuangZhou CAN-Bus Shield
    • DFRobot CAN-BUS Shield For Arduino
    • SparkFun CAN-BUS Shield
    • arduino-canbus-monitorstars224 - No matter which shield is selected you will need your own sniffer. This is implementation of standard Lawicel/SLCAN protocol for Arduino + any MCP CAN Shield to use with many standard CAN bus analysis software packages or SocketCAN
• ELM327 - The de facto chipset that's very cheap and can be used to connect to CAN devices.
• Wireshark - WireShark can be used for reversing CAN communications.
• Intrepid Tools - Expensive, but extremely versatile tools specifically designed for reversing CAN and other vehicle communication protocols.
• OpenXC - Currently, OpenXC works with Python and Android, with libraries provided to get started.
• openpilotstars36.1k - openpilot is an open source driving agent that performs the functions of Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) and Lane Keeping Assist System (LKAS) for Hondas and Acuras.
• CANardstars484 - A Python framework for Controller Area Network applications.
